# pheno-go-ctxkit

> W3C trace-context propagation for Go services. Stdlib only.

## What
`ctxkit` is a single Go package that parses and emits W3C `traceparent` headers. Use it to propagate trace IDs across the fleet (Go ↔ Rust ↔ Python).

## Public API
- `Inject(ctx, http.Header) error` — write `traceparent` to outbound headers
- `Extract(http.Header) (context.Context, error)` — read `traceparent` from inbound headers
- `WithTraceparent(ctx, string) context.Context` — force a specific value (test helper)
- `TraceparentFromContext(ctx) string` — get the current value

## Interop
- `pheno-context` (Rust) — byte-identical `traceparent` format
- `pheno-context-py` (Python) — round-trip tested

## Why
Every Go service in the Phenotype fleet needs to participate in distributed traces. This package is the canonical propagation layer; `pheno-otel` is the collection layer.

## License
MIT OR Apache-2.0.
